message:
test(fj-conformance): add Sort/Argsort oracle test suite

Comprehensive oracle tests for Sort and Argsort primitives covering:
- 1D/2D ascending sort (i64, f64)
- Argsort index correctness
- Edge cases: single element, already sorted, reverse sorted, negatives
- Sort+Argsort consistency validation

Ignored tests document known gaps:
- Empty array handling (divide by zero panic)
- Descending sort (is_ascending param)
- Axis 0 sorting for 2D arrays
- NaN ordering (differs from JAX)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
